description: Create a narrow channel navigation training scenario in Bridge Command's Solent world, set within the Southampton Water approach channel. The scenario must be saved to '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) Southampton Water Rule 9 Exercise/' and include 5 traffic vessels representing distinct Rule 9 encounter situations. Configure the scenario directory with environment.ini (Setting='Solent', StartTime between 08:00-11:00, StartMonth=9, VisibilityRange=8.0, Weather<=2.0), ownship.ini ('MT Solent Chemist' at Lat ~50.812, Long ~-1.308, Heading ~340, Speed 8.0), and othership.ini (exactly 5 vessels: head-on, crossing <20m/fishing, overtaking, sailing, and restricted maneuverability, all with valid waypoints). Update bc5.ini in /home/ga/.config/Bridge Command/ to enable ARPA (arpa_on=1), Full Radar (full_radar=1), 48nm range, and high resolution (256). Additionally, generate a briefing document (>600 words) at /home/ga/Documents/rule9_channel_briefing.txt referencing COLREGS Rules 9, 6, and 34, including three assessment questions.
